    Smoothies

    All smoothies are made with perfectly-ripened fruit blended
    with fresh squeezed orange juice, ice and sugar optional!

    Create your own

    Sm. $7.00(16 oz.) Lg. $8.00 (24 oz.)

    (choose up to 3 fruits to mix in your smoothie)

    Sunset Peach

    Sm. $7.00 (16 oz.) Lg. $8.00(24 oz.)

    (strawberry, raspberry, blueberry and peach)

    (papaya and mango)

    strawberry, peach and banana

    (mango banana)

    Sm. $7.00 (16 oz.) Lg. $8.00(24 oz.)

    (pineapple and mango)

    Early Glory

    Tortas

    Mexican style sandwiches made with mayo, mustard, american cheese,
    ripe tomatoes, avocado, white onion and fresh romaine lettuce,
    with jalapeno peppers on the side. Oven toasted!

    Tuna Sandwich

    $10.50 + tax

    (on wheat bread) (mayo, celery, tomato, onion and lettuce)

    $10.95 + TAX

    (ham, turkey and roast beef)

    $10.50 + tax

    (mayo, provolone cheese, lettuce and avocado)

    Aguas Frescas

    Made with fresh fruit blended with water, ice and sugar.
    Choose from watermelon, mango, pineapple or your favourite fruit!

    Licuados

    Licuados are made with fresh ripe fruit blended with low-fat milk, ice-cream (optional), sugar (optional) and ice!

    Create your own

    At Señor Mango's

    For your convenience you can call in your order

    SM on 30th
    Daily 6:30 AM – 7:30 PM

    4607 30th St.
    San Diego (619-584-0041)

    SM On the Way
    Daily 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM

    3042 North Park Way,
    San Diego (619-692-1969)
